Software Engineer • Angular Specialist

Building high-performance Angular experiences for modern commerce and marketing products.

Angular Developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable SPAs using Angular 15+, TypeScript, RxJS, and Angular Material. Proven track record of improving performance, reducing bugs, and shipping customer-focused features in Agile teams.

Download Resume Contact Me

About Me

I help teams move fast without sacrificing stability. At Centizen, I launched and scaled Angular applications used by marketing and commerce teams, delivering faster page loads, stronger test coverage, and reusable architecture that keeps development predictable.

Angular 15+ TypeScript RxJS Node.js PostgreSQL PWA

Experience

Centizen, Inc.

Software Engineer | Frontend Developer

  • Launched a marketing portal from scratch with a reusable Angular component library, reducing feature development time by 25%.
  • Integrated Razorpay and Stripe for multi-currency checkout, improving conversion rates by 18%.
  • Refactored legacy Angular modules with lazy loading and bundle splitting, improving rendering speed by 20%.

Zenbasket E-commerce Platform

Angular 15+, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Sequelize

  • Migrated a large legacy codebase to strict TypeScript, reducing production bugs by 30%.
  • Delivered 10+ reusable modules adopted across teams, cutting cross-team development time by 25%.
  • Optimized the load pipeline to reduce page load time from 5s to 1.5s, a 70% improvement.
  • Built multilingual i18n support across 4 storefronts and web push notifications using Service Workers.

Project Highlights

Angular Chat System

Real-time messaging without WebSockets

Designed a lightweight chat feature using RxJS observables and service workers to deliver instant messaging while reducing infrastructure overhead and keeping the experience smooth on the web.

E-commerce Core Modules

Checkout, order flows, customer management

Architected Angular modules for checkout, purchase management, customer data, and plan workflows, ensuring secure REST and GraphQL data flows from frontend to backend.
